hypothesis: Fine-tuning the Segment Anything Model 2 on synthetic liquid phase transmission electron microscopy video data will produce a segmentation model (SAM-EM) that achieves superior real-time particle segmentation and tracking performance compared to a task-specific U-Net baseline, because SAM 2's video-aware architecture and large pretrained feature representations enable more robust generalization across varying signal-to-noise conditions inherent in LPTEM imaging.
